summary:
PROTECTION DURING RELIGIOUS OBSERVANCES: Brandon discusses the upcoming Resurrection Sunday and emphasizes the need for spiritual and physical protection. Brandon prays against any terrorist attacks, plots, or plans targeting places of worship globally, specifically mentioning the safety of congregations in the Middle East and the United States during this significant time.

SPIRITUAL SOWING AND MINISTRY ABUNDANCE: Brandon explains the concept of the hundredfold ground and the importance of evaluating the spiritual soil of a ministry before contributing financially. Brandon asserts that God is the God of increase, comparing flourishing ministries that experience growth and save souls, such as the historical example of Billy Graham, to stagnant ones. Brandon advises testing the ground with smaller seeds initially and emphasizes that believers must take active responsibility for their harvest by putting their faith into action rather than waiting idly. Brandon also mentions specific ministries experiencing spiritual vitality, such as Collinsville under Pastor Candace and Chip.

THE POWER OF DECREES AND SPOKEN WORDS: Brandon highlights the critical role of spoken words in shaping reality, warning against verbalizing poverty or lack. Citing biblical examples like Isaac planting during a famine and references to Deuteronomy 28 and Galatians, Brandon declares that believers are redeemed from curses and should actively speak abundance, favor, and specific financial goals into existence. Brandon stresses the necessity of renewing the mind with scripture and taking communion to maintain spiritual alignment.

HEALING AND DELIVERANCE PRAYERS: Brandon directs prayers toward physical and spiritual healing, specifically targeting a ten-year-old girl in Brazil suffering from seizures and demonic attacks. Brandon extends these prayers to cover epilepsy, toxic brain pathways, Alzheimer's, dementia, and high blood pressure, commanding spiritual forces to release their hold. Brandon instructs individuals to apply a spiritual bloodline around their homes, doors, and businesses to ensure protection against spiritual warfare and fear.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND POLITICAL PETITIONS: Brandon shifts focus to international and political issues, praying for an immediate halt to ongoing trade wars and the prevention of any resulting shortages in medicines or hospital supplies. Brandon asks for divine wisdom for Donald Trump and JD Vance in their leadership roles. Additionally, Brandon prays for the upcoming Canadian elections, calling for a political shift away from the Liberal Party, and declares a wave of spiritual change and revival across Australia, the Philippines, Russia, and Asia.
rawData: [April 14, 2025]-[Watch what you say - one of the steps to walking in the blessing]-[https://youtu.be/U6ADBRVBHtc]-[Hey, good morning family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. There is a lot going on again as usual, but I just wanted to say happy Palm Sunday. We have one week from today that we are able to celebrate the Lord Jesus Christ and his resurrection. What a time of the year it is! This is my favorite time of the year, y'all. I mean, whenever the spring is here, the grass is coming out, all the beautiful trees are budding, and all the birds are coming back from the south, I personally believe, other than fall, it doesn't get better than that. I love fall, too; I love the colors. But I'm excited about resurrection Sunday. We're going to pray for the protection over the people today for resurrection Sunday, that no terrorist attacks, no plots, and no plans of the evil one would come against us as we go into our houses of worship to worship our risen savior. I know that the enemy comes to kill, steal, and destroy, but we have power and authority over him. We're not going to allow, in the name of Jesus, any of that to happen in any places of the earth. The Lord warned us when I've told you all about praying over the churches in the Middle East, our brothers and sisters in the Middle East, praying over them that they would have safety in this time of worship. And even in the United States of America, I know that we keep things at bay as we take our authority, take communion, pray daily, and come before him boldly, taking our rightful place and seat next to him. I know a lot of people liked the tithing video. I made that; I try to be real with people, but you're not going to appease everybody. So, I'm just like, 'Whatever. If you like it, you like it; if you don't, you don't.' It's what we believe, it's how we live, and this is how I'll continue to live. And what I believe is that unless the Holy Spirit corrects me, I'm just going to keep on keeping on because I've been doing it for 20 years. So, it is what it is. People ask me, 'Brandon, what do you believe?' So, we just tell you, 'Hey, this is where I'm at.' And if I told you the hundredfold ground, you'd get ticked off and wouldn't watch the channels anymore because I know some of the people you can't stand. So, we don't even tell you the hundredfold ground, but I know what the hundredfold ground is because I studied it. It took me years of sowing and praying and listening to the Holy Spirit and asking him what the hundredfold ground is. I found some nuggets, but that came through a lot of spiritual pressure. I try to hint around sometimes around these preachers that I know the hundredfold ground's on, and then I know the ones whose ground is bad ground. I say it's crap ground that doesn't grow anything at all. People really follow some of those folks and they go, 'Oh yeah, they're really good ground.' I say, 'No, that ground sucks.' I'm just being real. Probably not a good word to use, but it's just true. And you've got the one ground that's really good and they go, 'We can't stand them because they have jets and they have all this stuff.' Folks, I'll give you a hint on some things: if they are successful in ministry, the Bible says if you're faithful with little, God will make you ruler over much. So, God is the God of increase. He's the one that brings the increase on folks. And if they are walking in abundance, they've been faithful with what they have and God's giving them more. So if you see somebody who doesn't have much and their ministry isn't flourishing year after year and they're staying the same, they haven't passed the test. It takes you going from glory to glory, and you pass the test, and he gives you more like the talents. But you get mad and want to crucify the guy who has more and they go, 'Well, how much do they have? They have too much; they must have swindled it out of an old lady.' Folks, come on. God is the God of increase. So, you want to gravitate to the ground. If they've been in ministry—not like me, I've been in ministry for a year and a half going on two years. Two years, right? Wow, time goes fast. So I'm just a baby in this, just like a toddler. But if you've been in ministry for 30 years and you're still the same and you haven't changed and nothing's going from glory to glory and your capacity hasn't increased to be able to handle or reach more, you haven't passed the test. It doesn't make you bad; it just means you need to go through the refiner's fire so that you're able to handle more. Does that make sense, what I'm trying to tell you all? You see a lot of ministries that don't have any more anointing. They don't have any more presence. They don't have any more stuff going on for them. They keep going on the same way, going around the same mountain all the time. You look at them and then you give to their ground and you go, 'Oh, well, I understand.' But then you sow to the good ground that is blessed and you go, 'Wow,' and you instantaneously get a big harvest back. And I've learned to test the soil. I flow that way. I tell my wife all the time, 'Let's not go and give a whole bucket load of seed. Let's take $100 or $50 and sow it into that ground and see how long it takes.' And we'll call that in. It's not all on the minister, too. By the way, the Holy Spirit said this to me: 'Brandon, you're blaming the harvest solely on the minister, but the sower has part of it, too.' It's not all on the person in the soil; it's on the seed sower. So you need to know it's a half-and-half responsibility. And if you're sitting there just idly by going, 'Well, I'm just waiting for my good truck to come in with all my goods on it. Where's my miracle package?' You've got to believe it, but you've got to say it out of your mouth. Stop that milly-mouthed talking.
